tone: high-clarity strategic commentary with emotional realism
audience: creators, knowledge workers, and tech-curious general audience
scene_guidance: Alternate between presenter close-up and kinetic B-roll about automation
Use on-screen contrast cards: AI Strength vs Human Strength
Hold final 20 seconds on steady close-up for conviction ending
visual_guidance: Contrast visual motif: grid/system imagery for AI, human interaction imagery for human judgment
Avoid dystopian cliches and robot stock tropes
Use clean typography overlays for three conflict risks
voice_guidance: Short emphatic pauses at section transitions
Increase urgency through conflict section, resolve with calm authority in ending
edit_guidance: Cut every 2-4 seconds in first minute
Use pacing slowdown for accountability lines
Add subtle impact stings on contrast statements
thumbnail_direction: Split-frame concept: left 'AI SPEED' right 'HUMAN JUDGMENT' with presenter centered and conflict expression

title_options: AI vs Human: The Real Fight Nobody Explains
AI Is Fast. Humans Are Responsible. Here Is Why That Matters
The Truth About AI vs Human Workflows
metadata_direction.description_focus: Practical model for AI-human collaboration, accountability, and creator relevance.
